title: Nether Items Overhaul
description: Make some Nether items more useful than before
body:
# 🌋 Nether Items Overhaul  

**Nether Items Overhaul** expands the Nether with new ores, tools, weapons, and armor sets, introducing a new useful way to use some Nether's stuff

  
## 🐲 Wither ore

Very hard to obtain, because you need one Wither Skeleton Skull, along with Gold Ingots and Diamonds to craft it. There are tools, but like Netherite ones, they can't be crafted directly—you need to smith them. To do this, you must use a Netherite Upgrade and you can upgrade only from Netherite tools.

## 👻 Soulsinite

Based from Soul Sand, can be crafted using Quartz Ingots, Gold Ingots and Soul Sand, really similar to Diamond in terms of power, but has a different durability

## ⚪ Quartz ingot

As said by the name you can understand that this has been made from Quartz, you can make tools and other stuff, also, is very important if you want to craft Wither and Soulsinite Ingots

## ⚒️ Crafting Recipes

Craftable tools and ores recipes are vanilla like except for Raw Quartz, Soulsinite Ingot and Wither Ingot

[
Look to them here in gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-items-overhaul/gallery)
